src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Add the @EnableScheduling annotation to activate Spring's scheduled task execution support.
Replace hardcoded FFmpeg binary path with a value injected from application properties.
Register ServerEndpointExporter bean to enable standard Java WebSocket annotations.
Define MultipartConfigElement bean to configure file upload location to system temp directory.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for VideoService and IVideoRepository to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
Delegate file listing and filtering logic to VideoService instead of handling it inline in the controller.
Add a new endpoint to delete files and associated transcoding directories.
Add a new endpoint to delete only the transcoding directories for a video.
Add link generation logic to the index model for the provided location.
Replace direct usage of VideoCache with a new VideoService to handle file retrieval logic.
Replace VideoTransformQueue with VideoTransformHandler for managing video transformation tasks.
Add logic to retrieve and display a list of file entities from the directory containing the video.
Parse the video location into a list of links and add them to the model for display.
Remove the SSE-based progress endpoint and replace it with a standard model-based queue status view.
Remove unused imports related to the old implementation (FileCopyUtils, SseEmitter, etc.).
Add a boolean field 'canPlay' with corresponding getter and setter to the FileEntity class to track online playback capability.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: private boolean canPlay; public boolean isCanPlay() { return canPlay; } public void setCanPlay(boolean canPlay) { this.canPlay = canPlay; }

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace functional interface with default methods to support lifecycle callbacks.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed @FunctionalInterface and added default methods onStart, onLine, onFinish, onError to Progress interface.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Extract magic number for segment time into a named constant.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added private static final String SPLIT_TIME_SECOND = "10".

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Rename internal helper method for better semantic clarity.
Add debug logging to track the start and end of video standardization.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added logger.debug calls at the beginning and end of videoStandardization method.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Integrate new lifecycle callbacks into the video conversion process.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added calls to progress.onStart, progress.onLine, progress.onFinish, and progress.onError in videoConvert.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Wrap video conversion logic in try-catch to handle exceptions gracefully.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Wrapped videoConvert body in try-catch block, removing throws IOException from signature.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Clean up unused imports and add specific imports.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed java.io.* and java.util.function.Consumer, added specific File, IOException, and CommandUtils imports.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Inject NasProperties to replace hardcoded file paths with configurable values.
Remove the static hardcoded output path constant in favor of configuration.
Reduce the Guava cache initial and maximum size from 1000 to 100.
Change fields to private final to enforce immutability and encapsulation.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: private final LoadingCache<String, String> locationMd5Cache; private final NasProperties nasProperties;

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from 2.1.6.RELEASE to 2.3.1.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and newer framework features.
Update the Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11.
Add the Undertow web server starter to replace the default Tomcat server.
Exclude the default Tomcat starter from the web starter to prevent conflict with Undertow.
Add the Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable WebSocket support.
Add the Java-WebSocket library as a new dependency.
Add the Gson library as a new dependency.
Add the TypeBuilder library as a new dependency.
Add the Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Move hardcoded dependency versions to properties for better management.
Add the Aliyun Nexus mirror to the repositories list for faster artifact resolution.
Update project version, description, URL, and license information.

src/main/resources/templates/common.html.general_idea: Add a navigation link to the home page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the video queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the download queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the real-time log page in the sidebar menu.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Add a UI component to display and navigate through a list of video links.
Distinguish video files from regular files in the file list by using a specific icon.
Redirect clicks on video files to a dedicated video player endpoint instead of treating them as generic files.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Migrate the real-time progress update mechanism from Server-Sent Events (EventSource) to WebSocket for bidirectional communication.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Replaced `new EventSource("progress")` with `new WebSocket("ws://" + window.location.host + "/p")` and updated message handling logic.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Introduce a fixed control bar with an auto-scroll toggle and a manual refresh button to improve user experience.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Added `.fix_control` div containing a switch for `autoScroll` and a button calling `refresh()`.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Refactor the DOM manipulation for displaying progress messages to support line-by-line parsing and auto-scrolling.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl:
Replaced `h.innerHTML += data` with `setMessageInnerHTML` which splits by newline and appends `

` tags, plus scroll logic.

src/main/resources/templates/video.html.general_idea: Include the video.js hotkeys plugin script to enable keyboard shortcuts for playback control.
Update the page title to dynamically include the current video filename using Thymeleaf.
Add a breadcrumb navigation component to display the file path hierarchy.
Change the HTML video tag to video-js to align with the video.js library usage.
Add UI buttons for deleting transcoding files, deleting videos, and copying video paths.
Add a switch to toggle MSE (Media Source Extensions) resource usage for better browser compatibility.
Add a table to display a list of files and directories with icons and metadata.
Initialize video.js with playback rates, hotkeys, and MSE override settings.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle deletion of videos and transcoding files via AJAX.
Implement JavaScript logic to handle navigation between directories and video playback.
Implement JavaScript function to copy the video stream URL to the clipboard.
